examples: Copolymer beads of styrene and divinylbenzene were sulfonated by microwave heating.
Acrylonitrile copolymerized with divinylbenzene on polypropylene and then extracted with xylene, the cage cyano resin was obtained.
Methods: Prepared the monodisperse and big diameter crosslinked polystyrene microspheres with Two Step Swelling Method, Using diVinylbenzene as the crosslink agent.
